Name: Percentage of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection out of all activity executions in the event log
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection occurrences across all cases
Percentage of variants that include SW-Initial Reviewer Selection
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' out of all cases

Name: Number of times SW-Initial Reviewer Selection is directly followed by SW-AE Assign Reviewers
Metric: Number of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' activities for cases where activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection activities that are followed by at least one SW-Reviewer Agreed within the same case
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Frequency of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection occurring before any reviewer-related reminder (e.g., Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 or 2)
Metric: Number of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' activities for cases where activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection that leads to a final decision (e.g., SW-EIC Accept, SW-EIC Reject, SW-EIC Major Revision, or SW-EIC Minor Revision) within the same variant
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' out of all 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Number of variants where SW-Initial Reviewer Selection appears more than once
Percentage of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection occurrences that are followed by SW-Reviewer Declined before any SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Frequency of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection in cases that eventually result in SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: Number of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection relative to the total number of SW-AE Assign Reviewers executions
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' out of all 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Number of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection activities that occur after Plagiarism Originality Report Completed but before any reviewer assignment action
Metric: Number of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' activities for cases where activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' occurs

Name: Percentage of cases containing SW-Initial Reviewer Selection that also contain SW-Reviewer No Response
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' out of all 'SW-Reviewer No Response'

Name: Frequency of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection in variants with performance duration above the median variant duration
Percentage of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection that is followed within 7 days by a reviewer status update (e.g., SW-Reviewer Agreed, SW-Reviewer Declined, or SW-Reviewer Unavailable)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'
